title: Pearls Stack to 64!
description: Changes the enderman loot table to drop pearls stackable to 64 and adds a crafting recipe to change pearls to ones stackable to 64.
body:
adds a recipe to make pearls stackable to 64 (just fill the 2x2 grid)
also changes the enderman loottable (and piglin bartering in V1.1) (I couldn't be bothered to change all the chests too lol, for those you can just use the recipe or collect them as "rare" items)
